full_text:
Emperor Zhi of Han [Liu Zuan] 漢質帝[劉纘]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Emperor Zhi of Han [Liu Zuan] (漢質帝[劉纘]). Tenth Emperor of Eastern Han. Dominated by Liang Ji, who eventually poisoned him. Emperor Zhi of Han [Liu Zuan] was an historic figure affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Emperor Zhi of Han [Liu Zuan] lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
